```番組内容```
**高齢化が急速に進む中、誰しもが直面する可能性のある介護。
安倍内閣は2015年、家族などの介護を理由に仕事を辞める「介護離職ゼロ」を掲げた。
しかし2022年の総務省の調査では、直近1年間で介護などのために離職した人は10.6万人。

title: [初]ザ・ノンフィクション #271
description:
>*_```If you found any PCDN client is downloading this file, please use the methods in the text to block them and avoid suffer any loss.```
Just as a supplemet.(x264 FHD WEBDL with no CC)_*

```番組内容```
**赤の他人である親子たちが一つ屋根の下に暮らす一風変わった家がある。なぜ独身の元ギャルが母子家庭の居場所をつくろうとしているのか…
母子家庭のためのシェアハウスを東京近郊9カ所で運営する山中真奈さん（38）。自らもハウスの一つに住み込み、夕食の準備や保育園のお迎えなど、働いている母親に代わり、子どもの面倒を引き受ける…子どもたちにとっては、まるで“親戚のお姉さん”のような存在だ。
10代の頃は、いわゆるギャルで、家族とうまく関係を築けず、夜の街で過ごすことが多かったという真奈さん…自分の居場所を見つけられず、苦しむ人を、たくさん見てきたという。さらに、シングルマザーの育児放棄によって起きた、幼い子どもの餓死事件を知り、親の身勝手に振り回され、悲しい思いをする子どもたちに、自分ができることはないかと思い始める。不動産仲介会社で働いていた経験を生かし、8年前に始めたのが、このシェアハウス事業だった。
2024年3月…真奈さんは新たな挑戦を始める。築40年ほどの古びたアパートを改修した新しい形の母子家庭用の家作り。業者に頼むお金はないため、材料集めから、実際の作業も自らの手で行うしかなかった…しかし、そんな真奈さんの元に、計画を知った人たちや近所の子どもたちが、続々と集まってくる。
元ギャルが挑む、新たな子どもたちの居場所作りの行方を追った…
【語り】前田敦子**

title: [初]A-Studio＋2025.06.06
description:
>*_```If you found any PCDN client is downloading this file, please use the methods in the text to block them and avoid suffer any loss.```
Just as a supplemet.(x264 FHD WEBDL with no CC)_*

```番組内容```
**八嶋智人が、6月6日（金）放送の『A-Studio＋』（TBS系　午後11時～11時30分）に出演する。
7月6日（日）から上演の舞台「泣くロミオと怒るジュリエット2025」に出演する八嶋。笑福亭鶴瓶はテレビ初登場となる息子に取材。まさかの取材先に「テレビに出てきた中で一番動揺しているかもしれない」と、八嶋も驚きの様子を見せる。
「パパはちょうどいい俳優」と表現する息子のトークセンスとイケメンぶりを鶴瓶は絶賛。まるで友人のように仲良しな親子関係、明るく元気すぎる八嶋の私生活についても語られていく。
藤ヶ谷太輔は公私ともに親交が深い高橋克実に取材。2002年から06年までレギュラー放送されていたバラエティ番組『トリビアの泉～素晴らしきムダ知識～』で、共にMCをしていた2人。“MCに抜てきされた時の秘話”や“深夜からゴールデンに進出したときに降板を考えたこと”など、当時の思い出が語られる。
高橋は「ドラマ『不適切にもほどがある！』で本人役として出演していたが、あんな俳優いない」と八嶋の俳優としての器用さを称賛。本人役で出演することになった“ふてほど”出演秘話、ドラマ放送後に起こった信じられないような反響について語られる。
また鶴瓶と藤ヶ谷は、八嶋が憧れてやまない舘ひろしにも取材を敢行。数作品で共演を重ねて親交を深め、「ご飯をごちそうになったり、クルージングや乗馬に連れて行ってもらって、とてもお世話になっている」と、取材を受けてくれたことへの感謝の言葉を口にする。
「どこの空間にもなじめるし、アドリブもうまい」と、八嶋の俳優としての才能を褒めたたえる舘。八嶋は「伝説的なスターの方々と共演できたことで、“この人のためなら何でもやります”とちゃんとこびて芝居ができることになった」と、自身の俳優としての武器についても触れられていく。**

![alt text](https://www.tvlife.jp/wps/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/757228_01.jpg.webp)

title: [Salem.85-GP97] Pokemon [Stagione 13][720p x264 - Ita Jap AAC - Sub Ita] [FIX]
description:
![salem](https://i.imgur.com/Fn1UGIz.png)
In collaborazone con Gianplasma97

### Pokémon - DP I Vincitori della Lega di Sinnoh
Tredicesima stagione: episodi 626-659

[ ![resize](https://i.imgur.com/rqTxc0Im.jpg) ](https://i.imgur.com/rqTxc0I.jpg)

LE NOSTRE RELEASE DI POKÉMON
Il nostro obiettivo è quello di cancellare le censure apportate da 4Kids e TPCi, e di rilasciare una versione integrale di tutti gli adattamenti animati di Pokémon. 
Puntiamo a realizzare la versione migliore in assoluto, così che possa rimanere negli anni un punto di riferimento per tutti gli appassionati. 
Lavoriamo alla serie con tanta passione, e quando muxiamo facciamo attenzione a ogni minimo dettaglio.
La nostra versione presenta i master video originali NON CENSURATI, reperiti costantemente dalle migliori fonti disponibili.
I file audio italiani sono stati registrati/acquisiti cercando di preservare la miglior qualità possibile. 
Per rendere le release complete ci siamo adoperati per tradurre, adattare e sottotitolare in italiano le scene censurate nell'edizione occidentale. 
Invece gli episodi interamente censurati/mai doppiati sono stati completamenti sottotitolati.

![scheda](https://i.imgur.com/GbXY42i.png)

**Paese di produzione:** ![jap](https://i.imgur.com/KUYd8p1.png)

**Titolo Originale: **Pocket Monsters Diamond & Pearl
**Titolo Italiano: **Pokémon DP I Vincitori della Lega di Sinnoh
**Durata approssimativa: **25min per episodio
**Numero Episodi: **34 su 34

Ora che il Team Galassia è fuori combattimento, Ash può finalmente concentrarsi sulla qualificazione al Campionato della Lega della regione di Sinnoh. 
Lucinda, invece, si allenerà per ottenere il suo ultimo Fiocco che le permetterà di competere nel Gran Festival!

title: [R-Archive] Astro Boy (1963) Episodes 53~104 (English Dub)
description:
ASTRO BOY (1963)
---
Files are exported using MakeMKV, and split using MKVToolNix.
Not a remux this time since, because this is from a region 4 release, I had to adjust the framerate and slow down the audio so it isn't weirdly pitched up. The video quality is exactly the same as on DVD but I've had to convert the audio to FLAC. I should have exported as mono while I was at it but ... whatever.

5 episodes per disc, with the exception of discs 19 and 20 which have 6 episodes per disc. 
Includes screenshots of the menus, the jackets, and scans of the DVD discs and DVD cover art.
Includes Extras. (Only those present in the second box set. I do not have the first box set.)

title: The Secret of my Brother's Friend 001-018 as v01-04 (Digital-Compilation) (Oak-JXL) [JPEG-XL] [Completed]
description:
#### JPEG-XL VISUALLY LOSSLESS (-d 1.0) VERSION.

| Volumes | Resolution | Source | [Denoised](https://pastebin.com/ZeY9fqxW) | Leveled | Spreads | Posterized | Clean Raws |
|  :---------: | :------------: | :--------: | :---------------------------------------------------------: | :---------: | :---------: | :-------------: | :--------------: |
| 1-4 | x3072 | [Manga UP! Global App](https://global.manga-up.com/manga/559) | ✅ | N/A | ✅ | ❌ (JXL) | ✅ | 

*These compiled volumes include raw pages from the Japanese volumes to keep the page count and numbering correct for ‘complete’ tank-style volumes.*

----

***The JPEG-XL images are created from the denoised PNGs after converting from AVIF.***
To open JPEG-XL images your reading software need to support this, check [here](https://wotaku.wiki/guides/manga/jxl) for supported software.
Komga (and Kavita Canary) is able to open and serve JXL files, they will auto-convert if accessing (OPDS) application does not handle JXL.

----

Volumes 01-04 contains chapter 001-018, chapters only in Posterized PNG4: https://nyaa.si/view/1983387
Compiled tank-style volumes 01-04 of chapters 001-018 in Posterized PNG4: https://nyaa.si/view/1983388

title: The Secret of my Brother's Friend 001-018 (2024-2025) (Digital) (Oak) [Completed]
description:
Obtained directly from [Manga UP! Global](https://global.manga-up.com/manga/559).
[Converted and denoised](https://pastebin.com/ZeY9fqxW) x3072 **4-bit (16 Colors) PNG** images, split dual-pages are merged.

*All image filenames are tagged and have the correct page number, including dual-page images.*
- These chapters start with the left-side page first, start with a single page on dual-view readers for correct page order.
- Split chapters by Manga UP! are bundled together as a complete chapter.

----

Compiled tank-style volumes 01-04 of chapters 001-018 in Postered PNG4: https://nyaa.si/view/1983388

title: [Rurōni] Dragon Ball DAIMA - 16 (WEB 1080p Hybrid) [Dual Audio]
description:
### Dragon Ball Daima - Episode 16. Degesu


A mux of DSNP video with ADN Japanese audio and modified BestBob subs along with CR/AMZN English audio with an accompanying Signs & Songs subtitle track and a Dubtitles track.


# 


![DAIMA - 16__001_29854](https://i.slow.pics/cLN77cCx.webp)


# 


#### What's been modified:
1. Intro logo has been losslessly trimmed off from the video, and the respective audio tracks have been synced,
2. Timing for all the lines has been adjusted for both subtitles and dubtitles (some scenebleeds could not be avoided),
3. Typesetting has been taken from the [[Z-R](https://nyaa.si/user/Zero-A?f=0&c=1_0&q=dragon+ball+daima)] release and modified/recreated based on it. Some additional signs are typesetter by me,
4. Signs are matched with the English dub track (if applicable),
4. Dialogue styling has been slightly modified,
5. The songs' fonts have been changed and the styling modified; now the English is aligned at the top and the Romaji at the bottom,
6. Minor edits have been made to the script, including line breaks, overlaps, punctuation, etc.


# 


#### Short Info:
- Video: 1080p AVC 8-bit | DSNP WEB-DL [[VARYG](https://nyaa.si/user/varyg1001?f=0&c=1_0&q=dragon+ball+daima+dsnp)]
#### 
- Audio #1: Japanese | 2.0 AAC LC @ 221 kbps | ADN WEB-DL [[Tsundere-Raws](https://nyaa.si/user/Tsundere-Raws?f=0&c=1_0&q=dragon+ball+daima+adn)]
- Audio #2: English | 2.0 E-AC-3 @ 224 kbps | CR/AMZN WEB-DL [[ToonsHub](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=1_0&q=toonshub+dragon+ball+daima+dual)]
#### 
- Subtitles #1: Full Subtitles | [[BestBob](https://nyaa.si/user/-___-?f=0&c=1_0&q=dragon+ball+daima)] (Modified)
- Subtitles #2: Signs & Songs [Rurōni]
- Subtitles #3: Dubtitles [Rurōni]


#


#### Long Info: [Click here](https://pastebin.com/Pi9c4urq)


***


# 


This release would not have been possible without the aforementioned individuals/groups. Huge thanks and appreciation for their works.


# 


Feel free to notify if you notice any error.


# 


Seed after downloading to keep this release up.

---

**Notes:**
*Season 2*
. Restyled script and changed fonts to match EP 1-4
. Added OPED from EP 1-4

---

**Synopsis**
Far away from the reaches of demons and war, near the borderland of Zoltan, D-Rank adventurer Red lives a normal existence. Through perseverance and hard work, his dream of starting his own apothecary and peaceful life in the countryside finally came true. Abruptly, Red gets a live-in partner and assistant named Rit—the princess of Duchy Loggervia and an adventurer herself—who gives everything up to join him.
Although honest, kind, and loved by all, Red has a secret shared only with Rit: his real name is Gideon, brother of Ruti Ragnason, the “Hero” and a former member of her party. Ares Drowa, the “Sage,” kicked Red out of their party after their war against the Demon Lord after deciding he was weak and insignificant. Now, even though Red has left the Hero’s party behind by assuming a new life together with Rit, his past has yet to let go of him.

![](https://i.imgur.com/hX3UlMJ.gif)

---

**Language Options**
Included are two scripts that that do the following (Windows/Linux):

1. Make [Single Audio] Japanese: Throws out *English audio* and *Signs&Songs subtitles* tracks
2. Make [Single Audio] English: Throws out *Japanese audio* and *Dialogue subtitles* tracks
	
Put all the video files into the *Language Options* folder and run the corresponding script.
*Note for Linux: mkvtoolnix package must be installed*

title: 転生幼女はあきらめない 第01-10巻 [コミック][EPUB][DL版] - MangaEpub
description:
![img](https://i.imgur.com/C6p0AhT.png)

# 📚 漫画EPUB情報＆ガイド / Manga EPUB Info & Guide
 
EPUBファイルは、PC・スマホ・メディアサーバーなど様々な方法で閲覧・変換できます。

---

## 📦 ファイル互換性と変換方法 / File Compatibility and Conversion

このEPUBは、[Komga](https://komga.org/) や [Kavita](https://www.kavitareader.com/) のようなメディアサーバーを含め、多くのリーダーで使用できます。

> **EPUBファイルは7-ZipまたはWinRARで開くことができます。**  
> ファイル名に `kcc-` が含まれている場合、ページ順は正しいです。  
> `image_rsrc` が含まれている場合も、**EPUB2CBZ**を使えば正しい順序で画像抽出できます。  
> 📌 **画像（JPG）形式で保存したい場合は、EPUB2CBZでCBZ形式に変換するのが最も簡単です。**

📘 **日本語変換ガイド** – https://pastebin.com/8TTL9xJV  
📘 **English Conversion Guide** – https://pastebin.com/04XAsfps  
🔗 **EPUB2CBZダウンロード** – https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases  

---

## 🧰 EPUB2CBZとは？ / What is EPUB2CBZ?

[EPUB2CBZ](https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases) は、マンガ用EPUBファイルを画像付きのCBZ（ZIP）ファイルに変換するWindows向けツールです。  

- 日本語インターフェース対応  
- ComicInfo.xmlの自動生成（シリーズ・巻数・右開き対応）  
- 画像だけが必要な場合はオプションをOFFに  
- 出力形式のCBZはZIPとしても開けるため、7-ZipやWinRARで中身を取り出せます  

⚠️ ソフトの不具合などがあれば、ガイド内のメールアドレスまでご連絡ください。

※ Calibreも代替手段として使用可能ですが、変換精度や右開き対応の面でEPUB2CBZを推奨します。

---

## 📱 EPUB対応アプリのおすすめ (無料) / Software Recommendations (Freeware)

**PC / Mac**  
- [Thorium](https://thorium.edrlab.org/en/) - 高速・軽量で右開き対応のEPUBビューア   

**iPhone**  
- [Books（Apple Books）](https://apps.apple.com/jp/app/apple-books/id364709193)

**Android**  
- [Readera](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.readera&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Google Play Books](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.google.android.apps.books&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Mihon](https://mihon.app/download/)

---

## 📬 お問い合わせ / Contact

以下の内容に興味がある方は、[このPastebin](https://pastebin.com/8TTL9xJV)に記載のメールアドレスへご連絡ください：

- 購入した漫画の保存方法を学びたい方  
- 透かしなしの最新刊漫画を交換したい方  
- KomgaやKavitaを使って自分専用の漫画サーバーを作りたい方  
- 👉 [所持書籍リストはこちら](https://pastebin.com/zaMZtuf6)

---

If you're interested in:

- Learning how to preserve the manga you’ve purchased  
- Trading newly released manga with **NO WATERMARKS**  
- Setting up your own manga server using **Komga/Kavita**  
- 👉 [List of books](https://pastebin.com/zaMZtuf6)

Please reach out via the contact details listed in [this pastebin](https://pastebin.com/04XAsfps).

> ファイル名に `kcc-` が含まれている場合、ページ順は正しいです。  
> `image_rsrc` が含まれている場合も、**EPUB2CBZ**を使えば正しい順序で画像抽出できます。  
> 📌 **画像（JPG）形式で保存したい場合は、EPUB2CBZでCBZ形式に変換するのが最も簡単です。**

📘 **日本語変換ガイド** – https://pastebin.com/8TTL9xJV  
📘 **English Conversion Guide** – https://pastebin.com/04XAsfps  
🔗 **EPUB2CBZダウンロード** – https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases  

---

## 🧰 EPUB2CBZとは？ / What is EPUB2CBZ?

[EPUB2CBZ](https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases) は、マンガ用EPUBファイルを画像付きのCBZ（ZIP）ファイルに変換するWindows向けツールです。  

- 日本語インターフェース対応  
- ComicInfo.xmlの自動生成（シリーズ・巻数・右開き対応）  
- 画像だけが必要な場合はオプションをOFFに  
- 出力形式のCBZはZIPとしても開けるため、7-ZipやWinRARで中身を取り出せます  

⚠️ ソフトの不具合などがあれば、ガイド内のメールアドレスまでご連絡ください。

※ Calibreも代替手段として使用可能ですが、変換精度や右開き対応の面でEPUB2CBZを推奨します。

---

## 📱 EPUB対応アプリのおすすめ (無料) / Software Recommendations (Freeware)

**PC / Mac**  
- [Thorium](https://thorium.edrlab.org/en/) - 高速・軽量で右開き対応のEPUBビューア   

**iPhone**  
- [Books（Apple Books）](https://apps.apple.com/jp/app/apple-books/id364709193)

**Android**  
- [Readera](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.readera&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Google Play Books](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.google.android.apps.books&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Mihon](https://mihon.app/download/)

Superfly - Amazing

[作品情報]
Superflyがキャリア18年にして初の邦楽カバーアルバムとなる『Amazing』をリリース。本作には、Mr.Children「彩り」、ONE OK ROCK「Wherever you are」、星野源「Crazy Crazy」、back number「SISTER」、小田和正「たしかなこと」、スピッツ「渚」、嵐「果てない空」、SUPER BEAVER「人として」、Mrs. GREEN APPLE「僕のこと」、玉置浩二「メロディー」の全10曲を収録。それぞれの原曲の世界とSuperfly越智志帆自身のこれまでの経験の接点を深く強く繋いでいくことに心血を注ぎ、それが極限まで達した時には涙で歌えなくなってしまうほどの愛情を込め、大切に制作された1枚。原曲アーティストと楽曲への強いリスペクト、皆さんから寄せられた素敵な思い出のエピソードとで紡がれた、まさに“Amazing”なカバーアルバムに仕上がっている。

title: [Mocha] From Old Country Bumpkin to Master Swordsman (Katainaka no Ossan, Kensei ni Naru) - 08 [WEB 1080p x265][E-AC-3][49CCA106].mkv
description:
**Story summary from MAL:**
"Beryl Gardinant, a self-proclaimed "humble old man," is a sword instructor at his dojo in a rural, backwater village. In his younger years, he dreamed of glory as a master swordsman, but those days are long behind him. Out of the blue, he receives a visit from a famous former pupil who brings him world-shattering news—he's been appointed as a special instructor for the knights of the Liberion Order!

"With his life now turned upside down, Beryl travels to the capital and reunites with some of his former students: elite knights, an ace wizard, and even an adventurer who's attained the highest guild rank possible. But why do they all want his tutelage?! As far as he's concerned, they clearly don't need him anymore. Can Beryl live up to his new position? And will he ever get a moment's peace away from his adoring students?!”

----

The source novels are fairly liked in Japan, but the manga adaptation helped to launch the popularity of the franchise with its excellent drawings of sword combat. Hopefully that will eventually be on display in this anime adaptation as well.

Rough plan is to try to release an ep before the next ep airs, probably a day or so before it. Song tl eventually, as soon as official lyrics for the OP drops (which is towards the end of May) … eventual tv/web batch will have it in all eps.

For name and place usage we have been using the English releases of the novels by J-Novel Club.

**Описание:**
Лиам всю жизнь был высокоморальным, добродетельным и ответственным... и в результате умер по уши в долгах, преданный любимой женой. Но это не конец истории. Он переродился в правящий семье обширного межгалактической империи, осенённый сакральный знанием: люди делятся на угнетённых и угнетателей. И на этот раз он намерен взять от жизни всё, наплевав на всех остальных. Но складывается почему-то иначе. Как бы Лиам ни старался стать настоящим тираном, все его решения ведут только к миру и процветанию его подданных, а его популярность в народе растёт на глазах...

---

#### **Modifications to Hall_of_C subtitles:**

1. Added punctuation.
2. Applied proper overlay/masking to fully cover embedded CN subs on black bars. Replaced Hall_of_C’s opaque box method with full black masks. Overlay subs remain stable even when switching subtitle tracks.
3. Replaced ‘Golden Hall’ (Episodes 1-6), and ‘Hall of Dawn’ (Episodes 06_5-12) with ‘Dawn Hall’ for consistency and also because Dawn Hall is used in the ‘Info Panels’.
4. Fixed few signs.
5. Restyled it all, including ‘Info Panels’.

---

#### **Modifications to bilibili.tv subtitles:**

1. Replaced few terms to make it consistent with Hall_of_C’s:  
    - master of Lighthouse → Lighthouse Master  
    - doomsday → apocalyptic age  
    - Tartarus → Tartaros  
    - Mana Eco → Manna ecology  
    - multiplying → breeding
2. Fixed signs’ issue, it was clusterfuck.
3. Restyled it all, including ‘Info Panels’.

___

#### **Notes:**

1. I have added Hall_of_C's non-overlay subs as Subtitle Track #2.

2. Included chapters.

3. Mediainfo - https://rentry.org/ay4372n3

4. Remember to watch Season 2's PV (basically S2E00) before watching Season 2. It's a 30-minute PV which contains backstory of young Bai Yuekui. 2160p: https://nyaa.si/view/1739956, 1080p: https://nyaa.si/view/1983579

5. Season 2 is fansubbed by **Falling Star Pavilion**: https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=0_0&q=%5BFSP+DN%5D+%E7%81%B5%E7%AC%BC+Ling+Cage+S2, they also have different 1080p raws and 4K raws in their discord.

6. **Chronologically:** Legend of Yuekui (灵笼 · 月魁传) Manhua -> S2 PV -> S1 -> S2

7. Just subs and fonts - https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1zayFsEkB0h54MZ26mI13h5tanPF4G-BP?usp=sharing

8. You can watch S1's 17min PV which seems like something they released to test waters, just for visuals and a kiss with random: 
    - Torrent Dual Audio: https://nyaa.si/view/1983579

title: [ZeBenko] Dragon Ball Z: Creative Products Corp. [R2J DBOX Sync] [CLEANED] [Audio Only] [v2]
description:
![alt text](https://imgur.com/2BC4FfU.png)

## **Version 2**
I updated one of the audio tracks due to source file issues in Premiere. This version also includes dubtitles typeset entirely by myself from scratch. I also added a few lines of Japanese dialogue to the gap filled subs. That's about it.

----
#####  **Hola, you buncha baboons.**
Can't believe I have to do this again, but here we are.
These are the 11 episodes of Creative's Z English dub synced to R2J DBOX with cleaned up audio provided by [Krycek7o2](https://x.com/Krycek7o2).
"What the fuck is a Creative?" What a creative question!

> In 1993, a Filipino dubbing company named the Creative Products Corporation made an English dub of Dragon Ball Z; the first English dub for the series. Second English dub of the franchise, so long as you don’t believe in the shithole that is Frontier Enterprises.
Now, you may be asking, “Why should I give a fuck?”
A fair assessment. You probably shouldn’t, but I do because it’s lost media.
Creative dubbed the first 26 episodes of DBZ in '93 and, later in late '95, they continued from where they left off and and dubbed up to episode 49.

***This is audio only.*** If you want video, [mux it yourself](https://nyaa.si/view/1331089); you're a big boy now, I know you can do it.

### Audio

| Episodes | Media | Source | Channels | Sample Rate | Format | Cleaned by | Provided by |
|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|
| 11, 12, 14, 15, 17, 18, 20, 23-26 | VHS | TV Broadcast | Stereo | 48 kHz | FLAC | Krycek7o2 | crygus / NeverRamza |

### Other Shit

#####  Since the dub is heavily based on the Japanese version, any missing segments use Japanese to fill gaps. Gaps use leveled JP DBOX audio. The only exception being the NEPs, which sometimes use a karaoke of CHA-LA (depending on the episode), which I took from the [Dragon Ball Music Library](https://nyaa.si/view/1091842).
#####  As stated above, this release now includes dubtitles. They were typeset and timed by myself. If you have issues with the chosen names/ grammar, blame the dub, not me.
#####  The gap filled subs fill in sections of Japanese with the SoM English translation so that they can be understood via casual viewing. Certain scenes are outright left in Japanese, so those instances have subs too.
#####  There's two versions of episode 20: One with the insert song, and the other without.
#####  Join [this server](https://discord.gg/r5qkpvpwkK), would ya?
#####  'Benko out. Suck spit, get hit, and eat shit.

title: ＮＨＫスペシャル　人体Ⅲ　第４集　果てしなき命の探求
description:
ＮＨＫスペシャル　人体Ⅲ　第４集　果てしなき命の探求
[総合] 
2025年06月15日 午後9:00 〜 午後9:50 (50分)
ついに最終回！ノーベル賞・山中伸弥さんとタモリさんが「命の深遠さ」に迫る！８年にわたる人体シリーズ完結編。私たちの健康を支える医学の進歩、そして命の意味とは？


	タモリ×山中伸弥「人体」シリーズの最終回。２０２２年、“いち研究者”として現場に復帰した山中さん。生命科学の根底を揺るがす新発見「ダークプロテイン」にまつわる謎に挑んでいる。生命の神秘に迫り、私たちの健康を支える医学の進歩にもつながる最先端の研究現場をドキュメント。そして８年にわたる「人体」の番組を通して、命と向き合ってきたタモリさん・山中さんが、シリーズの最後に語り合う“私たちの命の意味”とは？

title: [VCB-Studio] 无职转生 2期～到了异世界就拿出真本事～ / Mushoku Tensei S2 ~Isekai Ittara Honki Dasu~ 10-bit 1080p AVC BDRip [S2 Fin]
description:
![Rudy2_3up_800.webp](https://img.2222.moe/images/2025/06/15/Rudy2_3up_800.webp)
  
无职转生 2期～到了异世界就拿出真本事～ / Mushoku Tensei S2 ~Isekai Ittara Honki Dasu~ BDRip

内封原盘日文字幕
Embedded official JPN PGS

今天是父亲节。
Today is Father's Day.

祝愿
各位单身青年，早日遇见你的老婆、老公或命中注定之神。
已经成家立室的朋友，愿你们拥有好老板、好基友，住得宽敞，养条大白狗。
To all the single folks, may you soon meet your wife, husband, or destined one.
To those who have already built a home and family, may you have a good boss, great friends, a spacious house, and a big white dog.

最重要的是——
在人生需要做出选择的时候，不辜负自己，也不让自己后悔。
And most importantly—
when life calls for a choice, may you stay true to yourself and never have regrets.

《无职转生》第二季的原盘整体质量较难一概而论。一方面，无职的独特线条外观、水彩风背景，以及带有重噪的美术风格，对部分观众而言或许不算讨喜。但另一方面，制作方在噪点的处理上展现出高度的技术水平，在码率受限的情况下仍然能充分保留噪点的时域结构，并引入了如在运动场景中切换为静态噪点等局部优化手法，整体可视为教科书级的案例。
尽管制作方在四张 BD50 光盘中收录了多达 25 话正片、11 话 NC 版正片以及相当可观的特典内容，导致视频流码率相比常规 BD 降低了约 20%，但整体画面中几乎未见因码率不足而产生的常见瑕疵。
在后期处理方面，我们先是采用了保守的抗锯齿、去色带及补偿性锐化操作，并对色度平面欠码部分进行了修复。本片制作的重点在于编码方针的选择。根据过往经验，x265 在压制强噪点动画时的码率效率不佳，而我们在无职第一季的制作中亦有类似观察。为解决这一问题，我们重新评估并采用 AVC 10bit、基于 x264 编码器方案的可能性，并取得了良好效果。从表现来看，x264 的内部逻辑与无职第二季的时域噪点状况相当契合。相较于 HEVC，我们最终成功实现了近 30% 的体积缩减，同时保留了与原盘相近的噪点视觉强度。
最后，特别感谢参与本次压制的组员所付出的耐心与努力，顺利解决了本片原盘存在的多个技术问题，包括但不限于 BD 流文件的大量拼接处理、音视频同步修复，以及字幕缺漏片段的补全等。
It is difficult to give an overall comment on the quality of the Mushoku Tensei Season 2 Blu-ray.
On one hand, it features characteristic line art, watercolor-like backgrounds, and a heavy layer of temporal grain, which some viewers may find visually unappealing.
On the other hand, the Blu-ray production demonstrates exceptionally skillful handling of temporal grain. It achieves a good balance between bitrate limitations and temporal grain structure, with local optimizations such as switching to non-moving grain in motion scenes. This is essentially a textbook example of good practice.
As a result, although the Blu-ray set ambitiously includes 25 episodes, 11 non-credit episode variants, and a generous amount of special content within just four BD50 discs, leading to a video stream bitrate around 20 percent lower than usual, image artifacts typically associated with low bitrate are almost entirely absent.
We tailored our post-processing pipeline to include only conservative anti-aliasing, debanding, and contra-sharpening steps. The chroma planes were reconstructed to restore damaged areas caused by the low bitrate.
Our main focus was on the encoding step. Based on past experience, HEVC encodes using x265 are known to be inefficient for strongly grained animation. We observed this in our previous ripping work on Season 1 of Mushoku Tensei as well. To address the issue, we revisited AVC 10-bit encoding using the x264 encoder. The results were encouraging, as x264 appears to be exceptionally well suited for handling this specific type of temporal grain.
In the end, we achieved nearly a 30 percent reduction in file size compared to using HEVC, while preserving a visual grain strength that closely matches the original source.
Finally, credit must go to the hard work and patience of our team members, who efficiently resolved complex issues in the Blu-ray. These included, but were not limited to, extensive splicing of stream files, repairing audio and video synchronization, and patching missing segments of subtitle tracks.

* * *

#### **[Love Live! Superstar!! [Season 1]](https://myanimelist.net/anime/41169/Love_Live_Superstar)**
#### **[Love Live! Superstar!! [Season 2]](https://myanimelist.net/anime/50203/Love_Live_Superstar_2nd_Season)**

---

**Notes:**
. Season 2 + 3 are [Single Audio]
. Styled all dialogue to match between seasons

*Season 1*
. Added styled OPED from EP 1-10 to EP 11-12
. Added insert song lyrics and styling for EP 11-12

*Season 3*
. Added more elaborately styled OPED from later episodes into earlier episodes

---

**Synopsis**
Everyone has a dream they strive to achieve, and so does the musically talented Kanon Shibuya. However, due to her stage fright, Kanon fails to make it into Yuigaoka Girls' High School's music program and instead ends up in the general curriculum. Even though Kanon makes the conscious decision to quit music altogether, her classmate Tang Keke rekindles Kanon's passion for music with her own: a passion for school idols.

Although Keke and Kanon try to form a school idol group, their effort meets strong objections from Ren Hazuki, the daughter of the school's director. Even so, the girls soon visit the director, who allows them to set up their school idol club under one condition—they must win first place at the Yoyogi School Idol Festival.

The resilience of these aspiring idols is put to the test as they face the challenges that come their way. Throughout their journey, the girls make new friends and meet new members that join them to become the dazzling idols others can only imagine.

![](https://i.imgur.com/sYlyS68.png)

---

**Language Options**
Included are two scripts that that do the following (Windows/Linux):

1. Make [Single Audio] Japanese: Throws out *English audio* and *Signs&Songs subtitles* tracks
2. Make [Single Audio] English: Throws out *Japanese audio* and *Dialogue subtitles* tracks
	
Put all the video files into the *Language Options* folder and run the corresponding script.
*Note for Linux: mkvtoolnix package must be installed*

### What is the .md5 file?
The .md5 file is a hash file, it is used to determine that there is no corruption in the files you download from the torrent. [New Link Mediafire](https://www.mediafire.com/file/4urg7ahxhoffseh/BreezeHash_v1.20.5.zip/file) to BreezeHash, a software created by a friend that can calculate the hashes of files as well as check the integrity of files using a hash file such as .md5

title: Love Live! Superstar!! Liella! 6th LoveLive! Tour ~Let's be ONE~ (Osaka Leg) (1080p)
description:
And this wraps up the Liella 6L tour!

The final stop didn't bring us much in the way of setlist changes, but with Sakuchan announcing she'll be taking a break from activities a few days prior to the live, the air felt a bit different. A bit more loving and supportive, more than usual. And it reflected in the setlist and its performances (especially the slightly modified ones).

We also got announcements for Liella's Special LoveLive! \~Connect The Stars\~ **featuring Sunny Passion** on August 11th, a Fan Disc Blu-Ray to be released on October 29th, and one accidental livestream announcement from Sayurin, which sent her and the rest of Liella into a frenzy for a few minutes.

Playback has been tested on the latest versions of VLC Media Player and MPV as of June 14, 2025.

Please seed! Hit and runs only hurt others those who come after you.

title: Love Live! Superstar!! Liella! 6th LoveLive! Tour ~Let's be ONE~ (Osaka Leg) (720p)
description:
And this wraps up the Liella 6L tour!

The final stop didn't bring us much in the way of setlist changes, but with Sakuchan announcing she'll be taking a break from activities a few days prior to the live, the air felt a bit different. A bit more loving and supportive, more than usual. And it reflected in the setlist and its performances (especially the slightly modified ones).

We also got announcements for Liella's Special LoveLive! \~Connect The Stars\~ **featuring Sunny Passion** on August 11th, a Fan Disc Blu-Ray to be released on October 29th, and one accidental livestream announcement from Sayurin, which sent her and the rest of Liella into a frenzy for a few minutes.

This 720p encode cuts a little under 10 GB from the size of the 1080p version, which should help those that need the extra space.

Playback has been tested on the latest versions of VLC Media Player and MPV as of June 14, 2025.

Please seed! Hit and runs only hurt others those who come after you.

猫猫が響迂と共に侵入した倉庫は、狩りの場で壬氏も襲われた飛発（フェイファ）の工房だった。そこで2人は特使のひとり・姶良を連れて現れた冷酷な女・神美に見つかってしまう。なんとか折檻からは逃れられたが、猫猫は雪と堅牢な城壁に囲まれた“砦”へと囚われてしまう。堅牢な城壁、そして大量の飛発。猫猫は自身がこの国をも揺るがす一大事件へと巻き込まれたことに気づく。

[KAIJIA] Joule Xingtian - Full Mini-Series [WEB-DL][1080p]
description:
So uh... this isn't *Armor Hero*, is it?

Joule Xingtian is an Independent Chinese Tokusatsu created by He Bangyan.
It serves as a spin-off/prequel to the (as of yet unreleased) *BLimits Man* tokusatsu franchise, focussing on one of the franchise's "enemies", a *Joule Harbinger* named *Joule Xingtian*. We watch him as he goes about his day-to-day life, and hunts down evil spirits known as *Wraiths*.

This is an extremely good show, and I think the less I say about it ahead of time, the better, this is one very much worth experiencing first hand.

We hope you all enjoy this masterful work of independent tokusatsu film-making.
*—CLIPS*

**P.S:** This is our first project where Sky has served as lead translator!

A monumental thanks go out to Sky for all the hard-work and passion that went into this project!

title: [Orphan] The First Line (1080p)
description:
Orphan presents a *very* recent short anime, *The First Line*. Directed by 29-year-old wunderkind China, it portrays a young animator, Mito, who works at an old-line animation studio under an irascible director. 

![screencap](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEg8x_pNnSC2SbtHTVfovHcKNNyvCIyqWFlXgd-ARwKZgr9wtK9E-cQYgPkm1fEs0NLHyoZ1uqn9arLgJFrWBjgKZ8LYdk-A_maknU1zMzMk7Z_U18VzoDV1I_ubsCqO2TDqeQIJtonyQA0iPp8-KAmZLizGQgcut4bFefqev5oxe48_pru-PgXLWeVpcXN1/s1920/firstline_001_216.png)

![screencap](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEhi44yPczFdZmsghbSXpr4oP2Ow0uXQ4OSo8UMzBQyXmD2R0H3R4mAVnSeGOIg5X-ymfKFH5DCSNMjOh8f0Dw0SQHVTlMO403Q-zeUe8L_ZO6JCuk9wd8AJoG4Dcfg94wQoOSmfKUAn5TObLgEx6arLA5_OfYpSh8pRScen9eYX6L7VcOVKSc5tqOhJ9mOp/s1920/firstline_001_1246.png)

Mito (and his exhausted colleagues) are trying to finish the director's film, but Mito's inexperience and self-doubt plague his attempts to bring the final scene to life, until a vision of (or nightmare about) of his director renews his determination.

![screencap](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEgXs11WHvJH37AmssWBq6C7LgcVTJI6gAgVr4p8L-4h84nDkx9W7Nr6By-sjCUcDAkNdpHu5S4HaUsBHOna67xngTO0tpnubBZjTGXwb0-X0GO2lGPDg00LcaOq1vx-2Ck94dCmxjLf7DW9JmD1NI8GuugLb8ZibSb9AjUvtJ38gZTA0bRi_ytzY9Hwt_wi/s1920/firstline_001_11174.png)

The short is a showcase for the talents of its director. See [this blog entry](https://collectr.blogspot.com/2025/06/the-first-line.html) for more details.

This release, and all Orphan releases, are available for direct download from IRC bot Orphan|Arutha in channels #nibl or #news on irc.rizon.net.
